arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ. انْتَظَرْتُ حَقِيبَتِي عِنْدَ مَكَانِ اسْتِلَامِ الْأَمْتِعَةِ. بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مَكْتَبِ الْجَوَازَاتِ لِخَتْمِ التَّأْشِيرَةِ. أَخِيرًا، رَكِبْتُ حَافِلَةً لِلذَّهَابِ إِلَى مَرْكَزِ الْمَدِينَةِ. كَانَتْ الرِّحْلَةُ مُتْعِبَةً وَلَكِنَّهَا مُمْتِعَةٌ جِدًّا.
translation: Stigao sam na aerodrom rano ujutro. Čekao sam svoju torbu na mjestu za preuzimanje prtljaga. Nakon toga sam otišao do pasoške kontrole radi ovjere vize. Na kraju sam se ukrcao u autobus kako bih otišao do centra grada. Putovanje je bilo naporno, ali veoma ugodno.
translationEn: I arrived at the airport early in the morning. I waited for my bag at the baggage claim area. After that, I went to the passport office to stamp the visa. Finally, I took a bus to go to the city center. The trip was tiring but very enjoyable.
